name: File Summarizer
description: Reads all files in a workspace folder and writes a summary document.
prompt: List all files in the directory '{directory}'. Read each file and create a single summary document saved to '{outputFile}'. For each file include: the filename, a one-paragraph summary of its content, and the number of lines. Format the output as a clean Markdown document with one section per file.

params.name: directory
params.description: Path to the directory to summarize

params.name: outputFile
params.description: Path to write the summary file
